description: An external or self-referential (legacy) institution whose coursework is recognized by this seminary.

fields.description: Inactive partners cannot be referenced by new Course Equivalences. Archived hides from default list views.
fields.label: Status

fields.description: Identifies this seminary's own pre-SeminaryERP history. Read-only after creation. Filtered out of default list views.
fields.label: Is Internal Legacy

fields.description: Optional link to a Customer record for registering contacts and other partner-institution information.
fields.label: Customer

fields.description: The scale on which this partner records grades. Must be a Submitted Grading Scale.
fields.label: Default Grading Scale

fields.description: Internal credit hours awarded per 1 partner credit unit. Identity (1.0) for legacy self-referential seminaries.
fields.label: Credit Unit Ratio

fields.description: When checked, converted grades from this partner participate in the student's GPA. Typically checked for legacy self-referential records, unchecked for external transfer.
fields.label: Counts in GPA

fields.description: Default conversion policy applied to this partner's grades. Must be a Submitted Grade Conversion Policy.
fields.label: Default Conversion Policy

fields.description: Grade code on the receiving/internal scale below which transferred grades are blocked (can be overridden by elevated-permission registrar). Evaluated post-conversion.
fields.label: Minimum Transferable Grade

fields.description: Optional decision artifact (partnership agreement, accreditor letter, director approval) documenting the relationship.
fields.label: Supporting Document

name: Partner Seminary
